description_long: This dirt bike features a vibrant green and yellow color scheme with black and blue accents, giving it a sporty and rugged appearance. The frame is constructed from metal, with visible suspension components and a prominent engine block housed beneath the seat. The wheels are spoked and fitted with knobby tires, suitable for off-road and urban terrain. The handlebars are equipped with handguards, and the seat is streamlined for a single rider, tapering towards the rear. The exhaust system is mounted high on the right side, partially covered by a blue heat shield. The overall design is compact and lightweight, optimized for agility and maneuverability in urban environments.
description: A green and yellow dirt bike with spoked wheels, handguards, and a high-mounted exhaust, designed for agility and off-road capability.
description_view_0: Front view showing the narrow profile, handguards, and the front fender with the wheel aligned directly below.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the engine, frame, and the full length of the seat and front/rear wheels.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the back tire, seat taper, and the symmetry of the handlebars and handguards.
description_view_3: Right side view showing the high-mounted exhaust with a blue heat shield and the rear suspension spring.
